title: ESTIMATION OF BISMUTH. PART VI. COLORIMETRIC ANALYSIS  WITH PHENYDITHIOBIAZOLONE THIOL
author: ANIL KUMAR MAJUMDAR
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Bismuth has been estimated both colorimetrically and gravimetrically with the reagent phenyldi­thiobiazolone thiol, Maximum absorption of the colour system has been found to be at 460 mμ. The colour system has been found to obey Beer's law through a long range of concentration of bismuth. Effect of diverse ions has also been studied.
steps_raw: Bismuth has been estimated both colorimetrically and gravimetrically with the reagent phenyldi­thiobiazolone thiol, Maximum absorption of the colour system has been found to be at 460 mμ. The colour system has been found to obey Beer's law through a long range of concentration of bismuth. Effect of diverse ions has also been studied.
